title: Creating Persistence Data with ulic /prep
text: Creating Persistence Data with ulic /prep When using the License Management utility ( ulic ) to activate and return licenses, you need to use the /prep command for certain license types to prepare your system for licensing. /prep enables the creation of Sentinel persistence data which securely maintains licensing data. Note: Always run /prep as Administrator or Root . When to use /prep Use /prep on Unix and Linux for all licensing actions. On Windows, use /prep with standalone licenses where indicated: Table 1. Standalone Licenses on Windows that need /prep : Standalone License Type Activate license Return license Cloud-Served (clock tampering enabled) Cloud-Served (clock tampering disabled) On-Premises (clock tampering enabled) On-Premises (clock tampering disabled) For network licenses on Windows, persistence data is created automatically when you install the Sentinel RMS License Manager. On clients that are connected to an RMS server which has a Grace-enabled license, persistence data is created automatically on the client. /prep only needs to be used for commuter licenses. In this case, run ulic /prep on the local client machine. On Windows, use /prep with network licenses where indicated: Table 2. Network Licenses on Windows that need /prep : Network License Type Activate license Return license On local system (Client) On RMS server On local system (Client) On RMS server Cloud-Served (clock tampering enabled) Commuter only Commuter only Cloud-Served (clock tampering disabled) Commuter only Commuter only On-Premises (clock tampering enabled) Commuter only Commuter only On-Premises (clock tampering disabled) Commuter only Commuter only For Cloud LM Licensing, always use /prep for all licensing actions. Note: /prep must be run as a single command. Run ulic with /prep only before performing your next action. Related Links Uniface License Management Utility (ulic) The Uniface License Management utility (ulic) is responsible for activating and downloading required Sentinel licenses, for checking out licenses, and renewing the lease on licenses on a regular basis. The licenses themselves are maintained by the Sentinel Cloud Server. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
